avatar: Handmade and craft Etsy sellers who have made a handful of sales but have mostly-silent shops; solo, creative rather than technical, time-poor, and overwhelmed by marketing
main_problem: Their listings are invisible because their titles, tags, and descriptions aren't written the way Etsy search reads them, so buyers never find them
main_promise: In a weekend, rewrite your top listings so they start showing up in Etsy search and converting browsers into buyers, using a repeatable formula instead of guesswork
core_deliverables: The Listing Formula — fill-in-the-blank framework for titles, tags, and descriptions matched to how Etsy search ranks listings
The 15-Minute Listing Audit — checklist to find what's killing an existing listing's visibility
The Keyword Grab worksheet — find the search terms real buyers type, without paid tools
bonus_deliverables: 50 High-Converting Title Templates — swipeable title structures so they never face a blank field
The Photo Order Cheat Sheet — the ideal order to arrange listing photos so the first image earns the click
order_bump: Tag Vault ($9) — a categorized bank of 300+ proven Etsy tags to copy straight into listings
future_upsells: Monthly membership with seasonal keyword drops
buyer_objections: I'm not techy / I don't understand SEO
I've tried tips before and nothing changed
Will this work for my niche?
roi_logic: Priced at $29; one extra sale a week from a single fixed listing pays for it many times over, and they have dozens of listings to apply it to
tone: Warm, encouraging, plain-English; like a fellow maker who figured it out, not a marketing guru; no hype
ethical_boundaries: No income promises and no guaranteed sales (results depend on their products and effort); no fake scarcity; keep all claims grounded
delivery_format: Instant digital delivery: a Google Drive folder with PDFs and fill-in worksheets plus a short welcome video, emailed automatically after purchase
